claims.statement: The 60% primary / 40% cooperating palace weight split (and its 20/20 or 40/0 sub-splits) is an engineering hypothesis, not a classical formula.
claims.runtimeImplication: No change to production weights; documents existing V0.8 behavior as non-doctrinal.

claims.statement: Across the full 100x12 corpus, palace-level (±8) and axis-level (±8) raw clamps never actually trigger (0% clamp rate on 7,200 domain-observations), so the configured clamp bounds are currently inert under real chart data.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; flags the clamp bounds as a candidate for review only if V0.9 adds meaningful new point mass (see CLM-AAV09-004).
claims.notes: Directly measured by this audit, not inferred.

claims.statement: Annual-layer matched evidence carries a net-negative weighted mass ratio (0.70 positive/negative) while natal-layer evidence sitting inside annual-configured palaces carries a net-positive ratio (1.84) and is identical every year for a given chart, anchoring intra-year and year-over-year scores near the same point.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; direct root-cause evidence for the 9 failed distribution-spread gates (see audit-findings.md Finding 1-2). Candidate for V0.9 temporal-identity or point-policy review.

claims.statement: Twelve Calculation-Core-supported annual stars (Lưu Đào Hoa, Lưu Hồng Loan, Lưu Hỷ Thần, Lưu Kiếp Sát, Lưu Long Đức, Lưu Nguyệt Đức, Lưu Phúc Đức, Lưu Thiên Đức, Lưu Thiên Hỷ, Lưu Thiên Mã, Lưu Văn Khúc, Lưu Văn Xương) are emitted by Calculation Core in 100% of the corpus (1,200/1,200 chart-years) but are referenced by zero scoring rules in the current V0.8 registry.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; establishes that adding scoring rules for these 12 stars is NOT blocked by Calculation Core capability. Each star still needs an individually source-backed domain+polarity assignment before any rule is added (see CLM-AAV09-005 through 007).

claims.statement: Lưu Đào Hoa should carry positive romance-domain polarity, reflecting the general Đào Hoa (peach blossom) association with romantic attraction/opportunity.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule from this claim alone; both sides of the dispute require a verified source before adjudication.
claims.notes: General domain knowledge only; no verified source.

claims.statement: Lưu Đào Hoa should carry negative or mixed romance-domain polarity in some school traditions, reflecting a romantic-scandal/instability connotation rather than pure attraction.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule from this claim alone; both sides of the dispute require a verified source before adjudication.
claims.notes: General domain knowledge only; no verified source. Genuine, well-known doctrinal ambiguity — not manufactured for this pack.

claims.statement: Lưu Hồng Loan, Lưu Hỷ Thần, Lưu Kiếp Sát, Lưu Long Đức, Lưu Nguyệt Đức, Lưu Phúc Đức, Lưu Thiên Đức, Lưu Thiên Hỷ, Lưu Thiên Mã, Lưu Văn Khúc, and Lưu Văn Xương are each individually candidate-eligible for a V0.9 scoring rule, but none currently has a school-scoped, source-backed domain+polarity assignment strong enough to move past engineering-hypothesis.
claims.runtimeImplication: Do not enable production rules for any of these 11 stars until each receives an individually-adjudicated, source-backed domain+polarity assignment. See policy/star-domain-policy.v0.9.json for the per-star breakdown.
claims.notes: Deliberately consolidated rather than split into 11 near-identical low-confidence claims; per-star detail lives in the policy file, not duplicated here.

claims.statement: Lưu Đại Hao has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's Bác Sĩ cycle producer (addLuGroup) is natal-only and does not emit an annual identity.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions (capability-coverage.v0.8.json).

claims.statement: Lưu Tiểu Hao has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's Bác Sĩ cycle producer is natal-only.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Phục Binh has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's Bác Sĩ cycle producer is natal-only.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Tuần has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's void-star producer (addVoidStars) only constructs natal Tuần/Triệt.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Triệt has no verified annual placement formula; Calculation Core's void-star producer only constructs natal Tuần/Triệt.
claims.runtimeImplication: Must not enable a production rule. Confirmed zero corpus emissions.

claims.statement: Lưu Thái Tuế functions purely as a magnitude prominence multiplier (×1.25) and never creates signed direction from zero.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; documents existing V0.8 behavior as non-doctrinal. Carried forward from SRC-AA-ENG-008 CLM-AA-ENG-803.

claims.statement: Across the full corpus, the Thái Tuế ×1.25 multiplier applies in 21.18% of domain-observations, but never once co-occurs with an axis-level clamp — the multiplier has not yet been observed to interact with the clamp boundary under real chart data.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; informs whether the clamp bound needs revisiting only if V0.9 changes point magnitudes (see CLM-AAV09-002).

claims.statement: The `dignifiedStaticPositive` point class and `requiresDignity` rule field exist in the V0.8 schema, but this pack found no source-backed evidence establishing which dignity states should govern main-star, annual-star, or Tứ Hóa contribution beyond current production usage.
claims.runtimeImplication: No V0.9 dignity change is justified by this pack alone; RESEARCH_INCOMPLETE for this topic.

claims.statement: The current domain-palace mapping's shared cooperating palaces (e.g. Phúc Đức feeding both family and wealth) are engineering hypotheses with no classical source found in this pack, but the full-corpus audit's low maximum inter-axis correlation (0.325, well under the 0.88 gate ceiling) shows this sharing is not currently producing redundant/duplicate axes.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; rules out shared-palace mapping as the explanation for the low intra-year spread findings (that root cause is CLM-AAV09-003 instead).

claims.statement: Annual Tứ Hóa (Lưu Hóa Lộc/Quyền/Khoa/Kỵ) are treated as temporally distinct star identities from natal/decadal Tứ Hóa, matching only annual-scoped rules; this exact-identity policy is production behavior with engineering-hypothesis provenance, not a classical claim.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; documents existing V0.8 behavior. Carried forward from SRC-AA-ENG-008 CLM-AA-ENG-804.

claims.statement: Only the health domain currently incorporates Tiểu Hạn (small-limit) as a cooperating input (weight 0.2); the other five domains do not, and this pack found no source-backed rationale for why Tiểu Hạn relevance would be health-specific rather than general.
claims.runtimeImplication: No production change; RESEARCH_INCOMPLETE for whether Tiểu Hạn should cooperate in additional domains.
